name: HDFC Bank Millennia Credit Card
welcomeBonus: ₹1,000 worth of CashPoints on eligible spends within the first 90 days.
rewardRate: Rewards Rate 5% CashPoints on Amazon, Flipkart, Swiggy, Zomato, Myntra, and select merchants; 1% on other eligible spends.
airportLounge: 4 complimentary domestic lounge visits per year (subject to spending criteria).
cashback: 5% on partner merchants, 1% on other eligible transactions.
pros: High cashback, Excellent for online shopping, Fuel surcharge waiver, Contactless payments, EMI conversion option
cons: Annual fee applies, Lounge access has spending conditions, Foreign currency markup, Cashback cap on select categories
